subcodes.first_line: O my God, my Lord, my Support, my Beloved, my Goal and my Hope! Thou beholdest the Countenance of Justice beneath the talons [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا الهی و سیدی و سندی و محبوبی و مقصودی و رجائی تری طلعه العدل تحت مخالب
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @prayer for tests and difficulties, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
